hooks.command: cd "/Users/mac/Desktop/SITE PAAPS"; mkdir -p sessoes; D=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d'); T=$(date '+%H:%M'); F="sessoes/sessao-${D}.md"; test -f "$F" || echo "# Log de Sessão — ${D}" > "$F"; C=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$C" ]; then echo "" >> "$F"; echo "## ${T}" >> "$F"; echo '```' >> "$F"; echo "$C" >> "$F"; echo '```' >> "$F"; echo "" >> "$F"; fi

cd "/Users/mac/Desktop/SITE PAAPS" && git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && git diff --staged --quiet 2>/dev/null || (git add -A && git commit -m "auto: atualização do site $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push)
